name: Apple-Cinnamon Cream Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute apple with butter and cinnamon until tender.
2. Combine egg, milk, honey, vanilla and flour.
3. Divide apples between two buttered individual baking dishes. Pour egg mixture over apples.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until firm.
5. Serve cold.
